steps.title: Identify the supported claim
steps.content: The passage says electrolytic hydrogen could help decarbonize petroleum and heating, even though obstacles may prevent it from dominating energy systems. That means its potential in those difficult-to-decarbonize industries is not fully realized yet.

steps.title: Reject unsupported specifics
steps.content: A blames carbon intensity for adoption problems, but the passage does not. B compares development across industries without evidence. D claims lack of production has limited interest, also unstated. The supported point is unrealized potential. The answer is C.
